title: Pickleball Thanh Hà
address: 130 Nguyễn Du, Hội An Tây, Đà Nẵng, Vietnam
plus_code: V8H7+HP Hoi An Tay, Da Nang, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: medium_nice
user_reviews.Description:
Pickleball Thanh Hà is a great spot for anyone looking to play in a well-maintained and dedicated space. The court is set up nicely, making it a solid choice for both casual players and those who take the game a bit more seriously. One cool touch is their stylish colorful-themed paddle courts.

With 7 courts they are the biggest in Hoi An. If you’re into pickleball and in the area, it’s definitely worth checking out. It’s a good place to get a game going and be part of the growing pickleball scene in Vietnam!

user_reviews.Name: Roryandjuliet Douglas
user_reviews.Description: Nice courts, good equipment 😊 Cost 180k for 2 people and hiring 2 racquets for the hour. Was very quiet at 7am when we started, got a bit busier by 8am

user_reviews.Name: Mattea Käppeli
user_reviews.Description: such a fun sport and easy to rent a court for an hour!

user_reviews.Name: Jenny Heavey
user_reviews.Description: Great place to meet the local Pickleballers. We were welcomed to play on our holiday from Melbourne

user_reviews.Name: Joe Lum
user_reviews.Description: I'm from the states and was looking for a drop-in Open Play, and just happened to come upon a "morning crowd" that gets there at 9:30am (about 8 of them).  They welcomed me in and we had some great competitive games for a couple of hours.  The manager at the front desk doesn't speak english and thought I wanted an hourly rental.  Good thing one of the players was billingual and it was just 30K for a "social club fee" for two hours.  There are 5 courts from what I saw and I don't know whether or not there's an afternoon/evening crowd or not, but when I left at 11:30am, no one else was playing.  Water is cheap too.  I'd say it's a hit or miss, but I was very happy with the games!

user_reviews.Name: Nguyenquang Minh
user_reviews.Description: Mình quên cái đai lưng ở đấy,điện cho chủ sân rất nhiều lần,nhưng cố tình trì hoãn.Mình ở HN,đến khi cho người quên qua lấy thì k nghe máy,nhân viên thì bảo k biết. Làm mất công bạn chạy từ Đà nẵng vào. Chán.

user_reviews.Name: Tri Minh
user_reviews.Description: Sân pickleball thoáng mát nhất Hội An. Giá rẻ, nên đến đây để trải nghiệm.

user_reviews.Name: Thuong Tran
user_reviews.Description: Sân chơi rất ok, sạch sẽ, dịch vụ tốt

title: Pickleball Biển Đông - East Sea Pickleball Club
address: 472/2 Võ Nguyên Giáp, Ngũ Hành Sơn, Đà Nẵng 50000, Vietnam
plus_code: 26QX+JH Ngu Hanh Son, Da Nang, Vietnam

owner.name: Pickleball Biển Đông - East Sea Pickleball Club (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: RED KİT
user_reviews.Description: This gym is disturbing everyone in the neighborhood. They don't care that their customers are shouting loudly at 5:30 in the morning. They don't care that their neighbors are being disturbed, because money has blinded them. Now, in response to this comment, they'll probably say that the land used to be a dump and was full of rats, and they'll defend themselves. If only rats were still roaming the land like they used to be, at least it would remain a quiet, peaceful place. You have no right to disturb anyone. You are committing a crime...These videos were recorded at 5:30 AM.

user_reviews.Name: Наталья Ромашина
user_reviews.Description:
The continuous noise from this club is making me crazy.

The constant popping sound of the game, combined with your players yelling and shouting, is relentless. It feels like a drumming right against our windows at all hours. This is a residential neighborhood, and it's simply impossible to get any rest or peace.

Pls enforce reasonable hours for your games. It is completely unacceptable to have members shouting and generating this constant racket at 5-6 am

user_reviews.Name: Zed
user_reviews.Description: Your new members scream at the top of their lungs every 5 seconds. It's maddening. I'm going crazy. I'm ready to pack my things and move to a new apartment. Please control your loud and obnoxious members. It's a residential area. Edit: contacted owner. Ignored me until I(and some neighbors) left poor reviews, so he finally responded. First time we spoke he seemed interested in finding out who the group was and asking them to stop. We had respectful conversation. Next time they screamed for 2 hours straight I wrote owner and the owner was incredibly hostile and vulgar. Made crazy accusations, lies and insults. Called me disrespectful. Tried telling me he cleaned up a landfill (it was just an empty lot 🤣) and said I was trying to ban him(literally just asked him for help with one group). Said I was sabotaging and harassing him(I wasn't). The guy is completely unstable and aggressive.

user_reviews.Name: Lucia
user_reviews.Description: Best place to play pickleball in Da Nang! Extremely clean, rackets for hire, drinks available for purchase & clean toilets. You can easily book courts online or via whatsapp. The staff are also so nice and friendly.

user_reviews.Name: Sandro Basso
user_reviews.Description: Love the court, it's airy and easy to book. The staff are always happy and very accommodating 💙

user_reviews.Name: Ross Hudson
user_reviews.Description: Decent courts but could do with having floor to ceiling dividing nets to stop balls flying across other courts. Slightly cheaper courts elsewhere also, but it is fine.

user_reviews.Name: Thảo Nguyễn Thị
user_reviews.Description: Love this place! Everything is spot on—great atmosphere, friendly service, and affordable pricing. I keep coming back, and for good reason. Definitely worth 5 stars!🤩🤩🤩

user_reviews.Name: Declan Rowlands
user_reviews.Description: Love these courts. 120k/hr through the day, 140k/hr in the evenings. You can rent a racket and borrow balls too.

title: KingKong Pickleball
address: 589 Hoàng Diệu, Hòa Cường, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Hai Pham
user_reviews.Description:
KingKong have to be the best place here in Đà Nẵng. Beautiful courts and great service.

And if you want to level up your game ... Coach Binh can help you with that.  We extended our trips longer just so we can take more lessons from Binh.

complete_address.borough: Khu đô thị FPT City, Ngu Hanh Son

user_reviews.Name: Tien Nguyen
user_reviews.Description:
• “Sân chơi pickleball này thật sự quá chất lượng, không gian thoáng mát, ai cũng có thể tham gia và tận hưởng niềm vui vận động!
Không chỉ là nơi vận động, sân pickleball này còn có dịch vụ cà phê tiện lợi, vừa chơi vừa thưởng thức hương vị tuyệt vời.”

user_reviews.Name: Thiên Nguyễn
user_reviews.Description:
⭐ Một sân pickleball tuyệt vời – không gian đẹp, đầu tư chuẩn!

Nội dung đánh giá:
Mình đã đến chơi tại sân này và thật sự rất ấn tượng! Sân rộng rãi, mặt sân nhẵn, nẩy bóng tốt, được kẻ vạch rõ ràng đúng chuẩn. Hệ thống đèn chiếu sáng hoạt động tốt, nên dù chơi buổi tối vẫn rất thoải mái.

Không gian xung quanh sạch sẽ, có ghế ngồi nghỉ và khu để đồ khá tiện. Nhân viên thân thiện, nhiệt tình hỗ trợ đặt sân và cho thuê vợt/bóng. Giá cả hợp lý so với chất lượng dịch vụ.

Rất phù hợp cho cả người mới chơi lẫn người đã có kinh nghiệm. Mình chắc chắn sẽ quay lại! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

user_reviews.Name: Huyền Vy Nguyễn
user_reviews.Description: Đẹp vị trí mát mẻ ..! Giá tiền hợp lý..

user_reviews.Name: Chương Trần
user_reviews.Description: Sân mới, chất lượng cao, phục vụ chu đáo. Có Huấn luyện viên Hướng dẫn cho người mới. Rất tốt.

user_reviews.Name: mArIn Life with Beach
user_reviews.Description:
清潔でカフェスペース、観戦スペースも備えた素敵なコートです。
風通しもよく熱がこもりづらいのも嬉しい点です。
コートは縦幅も横幅も余裕があるので、壁を気にしないでプレイできます。
屋根の間から入る日光でボールが見えにくくなることがあるので、時間帯によっては屋根の密閉具合やライトの強さを調整してもらったほうがよいかもしれません。
ありがとうございました。また遊びに行きます。

user_reviews_extended.Description:
Первый раз играли в эту игру😊
Остались очень довольны, много света и воздуха, работают кондиционеры, есть автомат с разной водой. Записались через ватсап и без проблем поиграли. Оплата наличными, 140.000 донг час+аренда ракеток(40.000/пара), остались очень довольны-обязательно вернемся😍😍😍

title: Kina Pickleball
address: 263 Đ. 29 Tháng 3, Hòa Xuân, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Tâm Nguyễn
user_reviews.Description: Địa điểm vui chơi cho giới trẻ đam mê luyện tập nhưng không quá quan trọng luật chơi. Vui mà vẫn giảm cân được ai mà không thích nhỉ?

user_reviews.Name: Thế Viên Hà
user_reviews.Description:
Điểm cộng: sân trong nhà nên không lo nắng mưa, đậu xe thoải mái, nhân viên vui vẻ.
Điểm trừ: sân trơn làm bóng chạm sân lướt nhanh hơn, mặt sân dốc về phía đường. Không có lưới ngăn cách 2 sân, khi sân bên cạnh tập thì bóng tập bay qua mình khá nhiều. Giá vé hơi cao, tháng 11 có rất nhiều sân khai trương, chủ sân nên cân nhắc giá vé cạnh tranh.

user_reviews.Name: Bao Phan
user_reviews.Description: Sân trong nhà thoáng mát. Khỏi lo ướt chi trời mưa. Giá rẻ !!!

user_reviews.Name: Lam_nguyen
user_reviews.Description: Mặt sân bê tông không phẳng, không chuẩn, dễ trượt té do quá trơn. Đánh lâu dài sẽ ảnh hưởng đến khả năng phán đoán đường bóng. Giá vé cao so với mặt bằng chung ( 120k giờ thường và 150k giờ cao điểm).

user_reviews.Description:
Really great place to play pickleball, we paid 120k VND for 1 hour, but it was not easy to understand with the person who was in charge of the place.
I would recommend to put a sign with the prices and the time allowed.
Do not hesitate to contact them on Zalo.

user_reviews_extended.Description: 한인타운내 피클볼 운동하는곳입니다.  소셜프로그램있어 혼자오셔도 함께 플레이할수 있습니다. 이곳에 한국분들도 많이 있습니다. 9-12시 11-2시 2-5시 있습니다. 1회 40,000VNd  10회 쿠폰은 300,000VND 입니다. 아주 저렴하죠.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nguyễn Trang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Sân sơn màu đồng đều nhìn đẹp, sạch , dịu mắt .Chơi sc ở đây rất vui,nhân viên thân thiện.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tuấn Văn anh
user_reviews_extended.Description: Sân thoáng mát cầu ổn định nhân viên vui vẻ  đánh giá rất hài lòng

user_reviews_extended.Name: Briann
user_reviews_extended.Description: Mình không đồng ý với cách làm việc của sân này. Mình đặt xé vé mất 50k mà từ 6h-8h, đương nhiên mình biết là social,  nhưng việc mà 4 người đánh liên tiếp mà không ra cho người khác đánh đấy là vô duyên. Mình ko đổ lỗi hoàn toàn sân, nếu họ muốn đánh thì họ có 2 sân còn lại để đánh tiếp. Từ Hà Nội vào Đà Nẵng muốn chơi pic mà rất là bực mình luôn í, mất cả thiện cảm. Văn hóa người đà nẵng là như thế đấy các bác... Khuyên nên set trình độ cụ thể, hẳn hoi, như thế nào, chứ để như này sân cũng không đẹp mà lại chẳng ra cái gì, người ta đi xé vé cũng cần cụ thể trình độ thế nào, sân ra sao. Mong sân tiếp nhận ý kiến

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hanh Lead
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tốt

title: HB pickleball 273 nguyễn tri phương
address: Nguyễn Tri Phương, Hòa Cường, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Gia Bảo Dương
user_reviews.Description: This place was very clean and beautiful. It was clear and well organized, which made it easy to play pic. I would recommed it for everyone.

user_reviews.Name: Hin
user_reviews.Description: Sân ở đây ok, chủ sân thoải mái, ở đây có tổ chức sân social chơi rất vui vẻ, thân thiện

user_reviews.Name: Hồng Hạnh Phạm
user_reviews.Description:
Sân nóng và bí
Nhóm mình thấy trên app phí từ 120-160k tuỳ ngày và khung giờ
Nhưng đến trực tiếp sân Đánh từ 11-12h trưa phí 170k/giờ (theo lời chị quản lý sân là đã hết giá khuyến mãi). Thấy cũng có chút sai sai nhưng cũng thanh toán và đi về vì lần thứ nhất k có lần thứ 2 quay lại 🤣 Phí quá cao so vs chất lượng của sân
Không nên thử nhé!

user_reviews.Name: Cơm Niêu Nhà Đỏ
user_reviews.Description: Sân mới, mát mẻ, giá lại hạt dẻ. Chỗ để ô tô thoả mái nữa. Sẽ đến thường xuyên.

user_reviews.Name: Từ Đức
user_reviews.Description: Sân đánh khá tốt giá cả cũng khá rẻ so với những nơi khác, buổi chìu đánh xé vé gặp những tay to đánh rất tín , ae mún nhanh lên trình thì có thể ghé sân này thử sức nhé.

user_reviews.Name: Huynh Le Hieu
user_reviews.Description:
Giá trên app 120k/h, nhưng nhóm mình ko book qua app mà đến sân thì phải trả 170k/h, theo lời chị chủ sân là đã hết khuyến mãi???
Chơi giờ ban ngày sân bí và nóng, cũng ko có gì đặc biệt hơn các sân khác, không biết dựa vào đâu mà lấy giá như vậy.
Trải nghiệm 1 lần, sẽ không có lần thứ 2 quay lại.

user_reviews.Name: Chi Y
user_reviews.Description: Sân thoáng rộng giá cả hợp lý sẽ quay lại đặt sân cố định

title: San Pickleball Union
address: 130 Tô Hiến Thành, An Hải, Đà Nẵng 50000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Rok Trtnik
user_reviews.Description: I went to pickleball today. Didn’t expect much but it exceeded my expectations. The court was super nice, the owner was lovely. Overall it was a lovely experience and would definitely recommend!

user_reviews.Name: Sarah Bradford
user_reviews.Description: This is my favourite pickleball court to play on in Da Nang! It’s a smaller more intimate setting with only 3 courts so make sure to book in advance. The courts and facilities are in good condition. The staff are friendly, always greeting us kindly and taking good care of us. Highly recommend!

user_reviews.Name: Maxine B
user_reviews.Description:
This place is well worth checking out!I
I was out exploring the area and found this location. It's new, clean, shaded, in excellent shape. oya lots of parking. The prices are fare.
After playing the kind man gave me Longan :)
Will be back.💯 👍 😎

user_reviews.Name: JOSEPH LUM
user_reviews.Description: Booked court for 9am to 10am...140000vnd  for 1 hr.  Can whstsapp people to look for a 4th.  They serve coffee and tea, also sell some shoes, paddles, balls, over grips..   It's covered so can play on windy or rainy day.  Or you can join a round Robin group later in the day.  Alternatively you can rent the paddle.  So far we've played here at least twice weekly and it's always been enjoyable.

user_reviews.Name: Honest Evaluator
user_reviews.Description:
Should have better divides between the courts so people aren’t constantly going into one another’s courts to pick up balls!

Balls that are provided with paddles are cracked and not ideal to play with.

Quite hot and no ventilation at the back of the courts.

Courts are more expensive than others around.

Tet prices were hugely inflated.

user_reviews.Name: S van der Merwe
user_reviews.Description:
Court is good. But rackets were old.
Staff was friendly -  but cut us off 10min before our 1 hour mark. (We started 11:10) There were no other people waiting to play.  They could have just allowed us to finish the game

user_reviews.Name: Bruce Merit
user_reviews.Description: Great courts even has a practice wall! Unfortunately smoking 🚬 area is close to court#1. Retractable roof for shade. Good central location and hours

user_reviews.Name: Raushaniia Polosina-Suleymanova
user_reviews.Description: An amazing spot for pickleball in Da Nang! The court is high-quality, with excellent equipment and a well-maintained surface. The staff is super friendly and always welcoming, making every visit a pleasure. Plus, the on-site café surrounded by greenery is the perfect place to relax after a game. A must-visit for pickleball lovers looking for a great atmosphere and top-notch facilities!

title: Sunny Pickleball
address: 58 Đỗ Đăng Tuyến, Hội An Đông, Đà Nẵng, Vietnam
plus_code: V8JX+XH Hoi An Dong, Da Nang, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Madison Layne
user_reviews.Description: Great courts with covering from rain or sun. 4 courts and paddles/balls to use if needed. The self-service made it super easy and convenient. Definitely would come back :-)

user_reviews.Name: Wanwan Gao
user_reviews.Description:
First time we visited here was a wonderful experience! Both me and my daughter enjoyed a lot with the activities especially the Pickleball, we had lots of fun!

It is a large outdoor area, but it is protected from the sun and can accommodate dozens of people at the same time. There are many ball games, which are especially suitable for people who want to exercise. Adults, children, the elderly, men, women and all age can play. We had a lot of fun there yesterday, and there are drinks and some snacks to replenish energy during the break. We will come back again, If I have more stars, I will definitely give more stars to this place. It is perfect for taking children to exercise together and if you would like to see handsome man and beautiful lady here, good choice as well for this reason🤣

user_reviews.Name: scrabbleking1965
user_reviews.Description: They have 9 courts, 2 of which are under a roof, always seem to be open courts except maybe around sunset. NOBODY goes out of their way to speak to a westerner, but I just break out Google translator and tell them what I am looking for.

user_reviews.Name: Bright Choi
user_reviews.Description: He is really kind and specialist.  It was great time with Mr. Sihh. See you later.

user_reviews.Name: Ildar Sadykov
user_reviews.Description: Good court for training. Very impressed with the level of training, very professional. There is a full service: if you need a court, rent a court. If you need a trainer, there are trainers, including for group training. There is also a service for collecting swords so as not to be distracted from the process. All at very reasonable prices. Pleasant level of service, I compare with others in this city, and not only.

user_reviews.Name: Vyl Sion
user_reviews.Description: That’s a kind of joke,day before we talking about rent a court with coach and this gentlemen said me and court coast 150 000 per hr and rockets around 100 000 (for 2).When I came here next day price stay same,but without coach…..money ahead  he said😎🤣Lier or something I guess ,trying to find normally coach)

user_reviews_extended.Description:

Vị trí ngay trung tâm quận Liên Chiểu, khá thuận tiện cho việc di chuyển. Chủ sân và nhân viên ở đây rất thân thiện. Xứng đáng 5 ⭐️
Rất khuyến khích mọi người đến đây để trải nghiệm ❤️

user_reviews.Name: Jeffrey Nou
user_reviews.Description:
It was a great experience, and Coach Trung told me that he also played singles.
So he gave me a lot of advice and gave me a lot of opportunities to practice and apply it in the game. He is very patient and careful to point out what my movements need to be improved.
I think it is a good opportunity, because I live in Hong Kong and there are not many coaches who are good at singles. This is a good place to learn pickleball by Coach Trung .

user_reviews.Name: Shakhboz Mamatkulov
user_reviews.Description: Полный мусор. Не разговаривают нормально,лежит и ведет как-то диалог.Про английский вообще речи не идет. В приложении написано свободный корт.приехал и по факту все занято. Цену вживую называют выше ,чем в приложении. 0 из 5

user_reviews.Name: Edward K
user_reviews.Description:
A very new Pickle ball placed in HoiAn!
we love this place. They are very very helpful and nice. The court rooftop can be opened and the toilets are clean. Many beverages to be sold. We would definitely come back here, highly recommended.

user_reviews.Name: Theo Tirel
user_reviews.Description:
Great place, the staff is very nice. They have many courts, we went with no reservation.
1hour = 200k (+100k for rackets and balls rental).
We had a wonderful time playing there

user_reviews.Name: Nico Conzett
user_reviews.Description: Nice modern pickleball centre, the staff is super friendly and attentive and has good energy in general. The guy offered me free cold water when he saw I was eating just before playing and also gave us without asking 15 free extra minutes to finish our set. It’s little things but it’s worth mentioning and I appreciate it!

user_reviews.Name: Smosabi
user_reviews.Description: Excellent facility with 7 courts. Lighted and has retractable roofs. Since the courts are surrounded by adjacent buildings, it is well insulated from the wind. Hieu, the person who work there, is really nice and hospitable. Location is in the heart of Hoi An tourist area.

user_reviews.Name: Donna Pacho
user_reviews.Description: Fantastic courts! So easy to book! Right in the middle of Hoi An. Will highly recommend to friends.

user_reviews.Name: ella davies
user_reviews.Description: Had the best time playing pickle ball, as two tennis playing a who were missing the game whilst travelling. Amazing facilities and great staff. We got to play with a local mother and son, and had so much fun!

user_reviews.Name: Elizabeth Chapman
user_reviews.Description: Amazing court. Great host who’s really nice and friendly!  Had really good fun!

user_reviews.Name: Trishna Patel
user_reviews.Description: We were in Hoi An for a few days and wanted to play some pickleball. The courts are in great condition and the location was very central. The courts are covered which helps with the heat. No reservations needed. Price was 200.000 for 1 hour, 50.000 for racket and ball rental for 1 hour. Surprised that we were the only ones there on a Saturday morning.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Malcolm McNamara
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I recently visited Summit Hoi An Pickleball Centre and had a coaching lesson with ToTo, and the entire experience was excellent from start to finish.
The facility itself is very well maintained, with clean courts, good lighting, and a welcoming atmosphere.
My coaching session with ToTo was a real highlight. ToTo is not only highly knowledgeable but also very patient and encouraging. The lesson was well-structured, focusing on both technique and practical gameplay. The coaching style was supportive and motivating, making the session both productive and fun.
Overall, I had a very positive experience and would highly recommend Summit Pickleball Centre to anyone interested in playing or improving their game.

owner.name: Picklehead My Khe Beach - Pickleball Club (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Bai'atur Ridzwan
user_reviews.Description:
My wife and I (Malaysian) visited Da Nang in February 2026 to get pickleball coaching with the owner of this court, coach Ho.

Firstly his teaching method is great. He's fluent in English. I took 8 hours (4 days) of lesson with him. Coach Ho thought me a lot about game mindset and strategy. What I love the most is since both of us are lefties, his coached me how to play specifically as a lefty.

Btw my wife was assigned to another coach at another court, coach Anh and she's also excellent!

Secondly, the court is well maintained, the surface is good, there's a friendly ball picker who helped a lot to keep smooth flow of my training.

Because we had such a great time, we even booked another trip to Da Nang before we went back to Malaysia to continue our lessons here!

user_reviews.Name: Supamas Chuaynuson
user_reviews.Description: Indoor court so you don’t have to worry about rainy day. Recommend for coaching sessions with coach Ho. He has so many important basics and techniques for tournament to advice and practice. The staff is nice too. He helps you pick up the balls during coaching sessions that is really kind and helpful. Definitely come back to play here again!

user_reviews.Name: Konstantin K
user_reviews.Description:
Great place where anyone can dive into the world of pickleball. They host fun social games, and I really enjoy joining the Round Robin sessions for DUPR rating. Sometimes we just rent a court and play with friends, which is always a great time.
When I decided to level up my skills, I started training with Ho, and that was a game changer. He quickly spots your weaknesses and helps you fix them with clear, practical guidance. His English is excellent, so every session is easy to understand and super productive.
You definitely won’t regret coming here! 🤟

user_reviews.Name: Noor Ibrahim
user_reviews.Description:
Had 4 days coaching session here at Picklehead when we were in Danang in February.
The court is great..nice surface, selections of drinks they even have fresh coconut.😍

My husband took private coaching session with coach Ho and another different coach for me - coach Anh (as we are at different level😅)
Both coaches are very good.

This place also have a dedicated ball picker to assist us when we do the drilling.
Wish we have this service in Malaysia! 😂

Already booked our next coaching and drilling session here in March

user_reviews.Name: Dawid Kozdraś
user_reviews.Description: Nguyen Ho is an excellent coach. His training sessions are well-structured, engaging, and focused on details that truly make a difference in your game. He is patient, attentive, and genuinely cares about helping you improve, no matter your current skill level. He takes the time to explain techniques clearly and tailors his coaching to your individual needs. I highly recommend him to beginners as well as players who want to refine and elevate their pickleball skills.

user_reviews.Name: Hoang Anh Mai
user_reviews.Description: Nice and friendly court. Whether you’re beginner or experienced, you’ll enjoy playing here. Relaxed atmosphere and good lighting. Owner and staff are very friendly also!

user_reviews.Name: 차원호
user_reviews.Description: Whenever I come to Danang, I visit and take lesson from Nguyen Ho who is a great lessoner and player. I strongly recommend this court for the potential picklers.

user_reviews.Name: mArIn Life with Beach
user_reviews.Description:
The court is covered, so you can play even on rainy days.

There is a shaded rest area next to the court with fans, tables, and chairs, making it easy to take breaks and interact with other players.

Due to its location, the court attracts many foreigners, giving you the opportunity to connect with people from various countries through pickleball.

The player mix is well balanced between beginners and intermediate players, so it’s easy to find others at a similar skill level.

The organizers generally do not intervene in play, so the social rotation relies on the participants’ self-management and mutual respect.

They offer an unlimited play membership for just 700,000 VND per month, which is a great deal for those who plan to come regularly.

You can sign up for Social events through Reclub. Spots tend to fill up as early as the day before, so early booking is recommended.

user_reviews.Name: Angel Trinidad
user_reviews.Description:
Came here by myself around 530 PM which was perfect time for their open play. Everyone was very friendly and welcoming, they invited me to play with them and if they could keep score in English for me they did. I don’t speak any Vietnamese so it was very nice of them to still make me feel welcomed.

Son who works there helped me at the front and let me rent a paddle. The courts are well maintained and very dry even in the rain. There is also water, other drinks and ice cream for sale. I am definitely coming back again!! Thanks Choi Pickleball Center for a super fun time!

Open play times are below. Three hours of play for fee of 30,000 at the time of this post!

6:30 AM
11:30 AM
5:30 PM

They also had free WiFi which came in clutch for me to get a Grab back to my place!

user_reviews.Name: Elsie M
user_reviews.Description: I loved this place!! It was close to the hotel, very fun. We got the courts originally to play skinny singles but little by little others showed up and we got to play a lot of doubles. Right as we were leaving, open play was starting and a lot of people started coming. Definitely a great facility.

user_reviews.Name: Jermaine Hankston
user_reviews.Description: This was a deeply disturbing experience. The pickleball instructor was rude, disrespectful, and showed clear racial bias toward me and my family as Black patrons. What made the situation worse is that he attempted to film us and tried to get us to repeat words in Vietnamese that we later realized were racial slurs without telling us what we were saying. This behavior was completely inappropriate, offensive, and unacceptable. No one should ever be treated this way, and management needs to address this immediately to ensure this kind of conduct never happens again.

user_reviews.Name: Bradley Tyberg
user_reviews.Description: Best pickleball court in Danang! Great facilities in a great location with cool bar/cafe!

user_reviews.Name: Giang Bui Trong
user_reviews.Description:
A 6-court indoor & outdoor complex is located in a prime location just half of mile from beach resorts, hotels and best golf courts.

Good quality court foundations and proof tents plus clean restrooms , especially you guys have a spacious garden area chilling out with music and beers after enjoying games.

The most impressive points is the host enthusiasm and his team mates good services.

title: Silk Sense Premier Pickleball Court
address: 01 Nguyễn Thành Ý, Hội An Tây, Đà Nẵng 560000, Vietnam
plus_code: V9X4+RJ Hoi An Tay, Da Nang, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Stephen Belenky
user_reviews.Description:
We've been coming here regularly and playing for several hours each time. The court itself is solid, and we’ve always appreciated it's scenic location and relatively laid back atmosphere.

Unfortunately, our experience last night was disappointing, and for a place that wants to build community around the sport, this felt like a real miss.

There was no staff on duty. Only a hotel security guard managing the courts. That alone created a tense dynamic. One of our players rented a paddle (not once, but twice after the first one broke). Both paddles cracked during normal play. He felt awful, but the truth is, that’s part of the risk when you rent out equipment that’s been used hundreds of times. Instead of handling it with care or curiosity, the security guard berated him and then charged 400,000 VND (200k per paddle). On top of that, he checked our bags without permission and accused us of taking paddles and balls, even though we brought our own.

We understand there are cultural differences when it comes to hospitality and accountability. But here’s the bigger picture: When you rent out courts and gear, the wear and tear of that gear is part of your business model. Charging guests for broken paddles without assessing prior damage or showing any goodwill misses the point of customer care. More importantly, outsourcing customer service to a security guard (someone trained to enforce, not to host) puts your guests in a vulnerable position.

We were genuinely sad to have this kind of interaction. We hope management reconsiders how the court is staffed and how situations like this are handled going forward. Hoi An deserves better pickleball experiences, and this could still be one of them.

I had a wonderful experience at Furama Resort. During my time playing pickleball here, Ms. Kim Thanh was extremely kind, enthusiastic, and helpful. She made sure everything went smoothly and always greeted guests with a warm smile. Her positive energy made my visit even more enjoyable.

Thank you, Kim Thanh, for your great service and cheerful attitude — you truly represent the spirit of Furama Resort! I’ll definitely come back again.

user_reviews.Name: Libby S
user_reviews.Description: We walked past and decided we would try out pickle ball for the first time. We booked for a couple of days time, the courts are well built, shaded and pretty private which is good if you don’t know what you are doing. This was very reasonably priced - we paid 135k for an hour (£4.30). Great, fun way to do some exercise while travelling. I would recommend (take some water and check the rules before going if it’s also your first time!)

user_reviews.Name: gctseng gmail
user_reviews.Description:
Review - Pickleball Hoi An

122 Lý Thường Kiệt, Sơn Phong, Hội An, Quảng Nam, Vietnam

This is as much of a review of Pickleball Hội An as it is an observation about my wife. We arrived at a little past 9:10AM and, because we don’t speak Vietnamese, originally we had some communication issues (until I used Google Translate, which helped a little). We had wanted to play for an hour, but the lady said neither of the 2 courts were available until 11:30AM and I was disappointed because we had a tour planned for 10:30AM.

As I turned around to leave, despondently, in swoops my wife and somehow she and the lady figured out that we could at least play for 1/2 an hour! We were told ₫100,000, which turned out to be a misunderstanding because it was only ₫50,000 for a half-hour.

Nice, clean courts with fairly good spacing, although I feel there could be a little more room at the baseline.  They provide equipment and balls.

One tip is that their entrance is actually through the alley, and not on Lý Thường Kiệt. We actually almost walked into someone’s house before going into the alley next to the house.

user_reviews.Name: Marco B
user_reviews.Description: We had a great time at Pickleball Hội An! The staff is very kind, and the courts are clean and well-maintained. There are also clean bathrooms and a shower with soap available for use after playing. I highly recommend stopping by for a game if you’re in Hội An!

user_reviews.Name: Jude Wheatley
user_reviews.Description: First time playing pickleball and had so much fun. Its covered from the rain, so a great option for a rainy day and the courts are well maintained. Really reasonably priced aswell!

user_reviews.Description: What a great spot! Courts are reasonably priced (100/hr). Staff is lovely. They open around 7 though…not 5am.

We’ll definitely be back to play more!

title: The Club House Pickleball HoiAn
address: 20 Bà Triệu, Hội An, Đà Nẵng 53000, Vietnam
plus_code: V8MF+2Q Hoi An, Da Nang, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Sabina
user_reviews.Description:
Such a welcoming place to play. The local skill level is high, but don't let that deter you. I received such a warm welcome and friendly, competitive games.
You can only shop so much in Hoi An, so come out and play, meet other travelers and locals doing something you enjoy!  You'll likely pick up a few good tips on restaurants, etc.

It is well worth it and added to my stay in Hoi An tremendously!

5 stars.
Courts are incredibly maintained, well built, showers available, covered roof that opens when the sun goes down. Great lighting.

user_reviews.Name: Mary Cooper
user_reviews.Description:
Disappointed.

We are pickleball fans who are traveling as a couple. We read from other reviews that we could book a court here and ask for a couple other pickleball players to make up a game. The consierge at our hotel called and was assured that this would happen. But when we showed up at the reserved time, we were told that no one was available to play with us.

There was a coach practicing with two young ladies on another court. We asked if he could coach us after he was done -- but he said he was too busy.

We hit the ball back and forth between ourselves for awhile, then asked the young ladies (who were somehow affiliated with the club, since one took our payment) if we could have a quick game when they were done. But no, they said they were too busy.

So all in all, a disappointing experience. One quick game with someone -- anyone -- would have saved the day. But no.

On the other hand, the price to rent the court/paddle/balls is reasonable (150 dong/hour) and the courts are beautiful. We wish we could have played there.

user_reviews.Name: Michael Nolan
user_reviews.Description:
Myself and my partner visited in February. We were staying in Hoi An for 5 nights and just fancied an afternoon doing something different and getting a bit of a workout.

We enquired with the staff in the morning and booked the court for early afternoon. It cost us 150,000 VD (less than £5) for an hour of play. This included the paddles and ball.

The facilities were great and we really enjoyed ourselves. Would recommend to anyone visiting!

user_reviews.Name: Brian Rychlicki
user_reviews.Description: This is an amazing pickleball facility in downtown Hoi An. Within a short walking distance of the main tourist area.  The courts and clubhouse are great and you can even get paddles to use if you don’t have one to play with. balls are supplies and the staff are friendly. The roof open and closes based on weather.  I play at a higher level and contacted the owner/manager Hung who was able to set me up with some great play with the locals including himself.  The locals were very good but were also extremely friendly and fun to play with. There were lots of people playing at all ages - young and old, beginner and advanced and the place was full of alot of positive energy.  I highly recommend you visit this place. Also lots of restaurants right next to the courts if your group wants to have some drinks or food.  I played there about 6 times in February 2025.

user_reviews.Name: Julian Gilbert
user_reviews.Description:
Great spot to get some exercise in while on vacation. Balls and paddles included in court rental is key. Courts are covered by awning which help protected from the elements.

We called ahead for reservations to the number in the google profile and our courts were booked without issue. Highly recommend!

user_reviews.Name: DT
user_reviews.Description: 150.000 dong for one hour. Paddle and balls are included. In the morning it was empty but in the evening you should definitely book beforehand.

user_reviews.Name: Gordon-James
user_reviews.Description: What a great place to play pickleball in the heart of Hoi An. Better still owner Hung Le and his staff made us feel so welcome! We loved playing here and will definitely be back when next in Hoi An! Highly recommended!

user_reviews.Name: Grete Gessler
user_reviews.Description:
Really nice pickleball courts ! It seems pretty new so everything is in great condition.
Kind of busy so I would recommend to Reservate a court in advance (100k deposite). :)

user_reviews_extended.Name: brent plesse
user_reviews_extended.Description: The courts were very nice and even if it rains you can play and stay dry.    The staff is very friendly and the location is great too.   It was not difficult to reserve a court.   I highly recommend playing here while in Hoi An

user_reviews_extended.Description: My partner wanted to play pickleball for an hour. The club house kindly organised for my partner to play someone from the club. Great fun and 150k for 1 hour with paddle and ball. Lovely place, thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Description: Nice place to play pickleball. Good courts & nets. Covered. Airy, so not too hot

user_reviews_extended.Name: Danielle D
user_reviews_extended.Description: Perfect spot to get some exercise in! Paddles and ball are free to rent. Water and pocari sweat are available for purchase. The staff was very nice and takes really good care of the place!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eleanor Lloyd
user_reviews_extended.Description: Super friendly environment and great courts and equipment!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shaun M
user_reviews_extended.Description: Enjoyed playing pickleball here. Friendly owner also played one game with him and his family. Would recommend

user_reviews_extended.Name: Laplander Doppler
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great facility in Hoian. Relatively good courts and shaded and covered. Great coaching available too. Worth a visit if you're keen and have the time!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Richard Lamoureux
user_reviews_extended.Description: We had such a fun time playing at the club. Great facilities and staff is welcoming. We highly recommend visiting if you travel Hoi A Vietnam. The owner Hoan (I hope I spelled it right) made us feel right at home. We had competitive matches.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alex Kalokerinos
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great courts with lots of space and the staff are super helpful and friendly. Location is really central. Have tried a few of the courts in Hoi An and this is the best, definitely stop by if you are visiting.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jordi CF
user_reviews_extended.Description:
És un encert haver trobat aquest lloc. Pots venir qualsevol dia a partir de les 2pm i jugar una bona estona a pickleball. Et deixen raqueta i et posen a jugar segons el nivell que tens. També et fan jugar a nivell més alt per què aprenguis. Hi ha molt bon ambient. 100% recomanable. Parlen anglès. Pots contactarlos per WhatsApp o sms.
50k la hora

user_reviews_extended.Name: 김남열
user_reviews_extended.Description:
코트 대여비로 알고 갔는데 1인씩 각자 비용으로 달라고 하네요. 황당...
지역주민들이 오니 주어진 시간보다 일찍 끝내라고 합니다.

직원 말고 운동 환경은 좋아요.

user_reviews_extended.Name: vunguyen honganh
user_reviews_extended.Description: Rất tốt. Mình sống ở đây và đánh hằng tuần. Địa điểm thuận lợi, sân rộng rãi và ngay tại trung tâm

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jer Die
user_reviews_extended.Description: Top, excellent tarif avec prêt de raquettes et balles. Après avoir transpiré, allez boire un verre au art coffee Hoi An, un délice.

user_reviews_extended.Description: Sân có mái che mát, địa điểm thuận tiện, phù hợp cho cả nhà tôi.

title: Khu thể thao Lữ đoàn 532 - Pickleball- Football - Cafe

owner.name: Khu thể thao Lữ đoàn 532 - Pickleball- Football - Cafe (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Vo Thanh Tung
user_reviews.Description: Ok

user_reviews.Name: Thảo Vy
user_reviews.Description: Khu thể thao Lữ đoàn 532 là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho những ai yêu thích vận động và thư giãn. Không gian xanh mát, sạch sẽ cùng các tiện ích đa dạng từ sân bóng đá, khu vực pickleball đến quán cafe phục vụ đồ uống ngon và giá cả hợp lý. Nhân viên thân thiện, nhiệt tình tạo cảm giác thoải mái cho khách hàng. Tuy nhiên, để trải nghiệm thêm phần trọn vẹn, có thể cân nhắc bổ sung thêm các hoạt động âm nhạc nhẹ nhàng vào buổi tối để tạo không khí thư giãn sau những giờ chơi thể thao căng thẳng. Với Tuneast, khu thể thao có thể tạo ra một không gian âm nhạc riêng, cho phép khách hàng đặt bài hát yêu thích hoặc gửi lời chúc ý nghĩa, chắc chắn sẽ mang lại sự hài lòng hơn nữa.

title: Hot Kitchen Pickleball Hoi An - Sân Pickleball
address: 211 Lý Thái Tổ, Hội An Tây, Đà Nẵng, Vietnam
plus_code: V8QH+GH Hoi An Tay, Da Nang, Vietnam

owner.name: Hot Kitchen Pickleball Hoi An - Sân Pickleball (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: James La Terriere
user_reviews.Description: A great 3 court club. My wife and I dropped in for two afternoon sessions. Both days there were a gang of guys playing fast and furious pickleball. I think they were the club team. Despite speaking only patchy English they were welcoming and we had some great games. Vince built the club and runs the show. If you are a beginner book some lessons with him, for advanced players test your skills against the team.

user_reviews.Name: hòa nguyễn viết
user_reviews.Description: "Had an amazing time playing pickleball at Hotkitchen in Hoi An! The court is great, the atmosphere is fantastic, and the people are super friendly. Big thanks to the team for providing such a wonderful place to play. Can't wait to come back!" 🤗🤗🥰🥰

user_reviews.Name: le vinh
user_reviews.Description:
Hi vince
Thank you very much for your lesson we have a great time at your court
Highly recommend this court have great location right in the city it take only five minute wark from old town. Court with cover roof you can play even rain

user_reviews.Name: Tom Buckle
user_reviews.Description: A main highlight of our trip. Very accommodating staff and courts in great condition. Rackets and balls are free. We went twice, and would keep going back if we were in Hoi An for longer.

user_reviews.Name: Steven Vetter
user_reviews.Description: Our first time playing pickleball!  Hot Kitchen Pickleball Hoi An - Sân Pickleball was a great experience! The staff and regular players were super friendly and helped us understand the rules. It’s a fun and accessible game for all skill levels! The price was very reasonable at 150K or 180K VND per hour for four people, including rackets. Highly recommended!

user_reviews.Name: mason parsley
user_reviews.Description:
Hot kitchen Pickleball Hoi An is the place to play!

They have the most inviting court I’ve ever been on. I showed up as a visitor and left as a friend. They have various refreshments including delicious homemade coffee.

Want to take a lesson?
Their experts have got you covered.

Didn’t travel with a ball or paddle?
They have that too!

With the new roof you can happily play rain or shine.

Whether you’re new to the game or have plenty of experience you will enjoy Hot kitchen Pickleball Hoi An! 😊🤙

user_reviews.Name: Eliot Stutt
user_reviews.Description: Very new and clean facility. Paddles and balls are included in the price, very good value for money. Would come back again but unfortunately we leave Hoi An tomorrow.

user_reviews.Name: Meeli Einpalu
user_reviews.Description: Nice courts, polite people, can play raining. Recets and balles available.

user_reviews_extended.Description: Only one star for non Viet... No one speaks English and didn't want to talk to me. Viets ratings would be different.

user_reviews_extended.Name: todd barson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Beautiful three court courts.  I sat for an hour watching, hoping someone would say hello or invite me into a game.  Nope

user_reviews_extended.Name: Matt Keene
user_reviews_extended.Description: A terrific place to play with very friendly staff.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vy Tuong
user_reviews_extended.Description: The court so beautifull. We will back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mitchell McLean
user_reviews_extended.Description: Had so much fun playing pickleball here with my mate.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Big Nick
user_reviews_extended.Description: Couldn't have been more unfriendly. Must be scared to play against foreigners i guess 🤔

user_reviews_extended.Name: Julie Boissier
user_reviews_extended.Description: Super expérience dans ce complexe de 3 terrains ! Bel accueil, le personnel a pris le temps de nous expliquer les règles (c’était notre première fois) et nous a prêté le matériel. Nous avons joué avec une autre paire, ce qui a rendu le moment encore plus convivial. Bonus : comme le terrain était libre après, nous avons pu jouer plus longtemps que prévu ! Prix très raisonnable : 150 000 Dong pour 1h. Je recommande vivement pour une activité sportive et amusante !

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hiếu Nguyễn
user_reviews_extended.Description: Địa điểm khá mới mẻ, sân rộng rãi thoáng mát, không bị bí hơi.

user_reviews_extended.Description: Sân sạch-gần trung tâm

user_reviews.Description: My partner and I went and played pickleball for the first time this morning and we had so much fun! user_reviews.Description: Sân đẹp. Mặt sân mịn, sơn kỹ. Khoảng trống xung quanh sân rộng rãi, đánh thoả mái. Chủ sân vui vẻ, nhiệt tình 👍

user_reviews.Description: Sân sạch đẹp, rộng rãi, nhân viên nhiệt tình. 10 điểm cho chất lượng

user_reviews.Name: tien nguyenhuu
user_reviews.Description: Sân rộng rãi, thoáng đẹp, sạch sẽ, màu sắc sáng nhân viên nhiệt tình. Một địa điểm vui chơi tuyệt vời.

user_reviews_extended.Description: My partner and I went and played pickleball for the first time this morning and we had so much fun! The court is new and clean, and the owner is so welcoming and friendly🙏🏽 We rented the paddles and practice ball and it was really affordable. Plus such a great workout! They invited us to come back and play again, and we’re really excited to join😊

title: Pickleball Thuỷ Lợi Hội An
address: 24 Phan Bá Phiến, Hội An Tây, Đà Nẵng, Vietnam
plus_code: V8QF+24 Hoi An Tay, Da Nang, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Allen Williams
user_reviews.Description: Great place to go to and play. I came early and was trying to see if anyone was willing to play. The local worker said that he would play with me and we played for a bit. Good games full court and skinny singles. The facilities are shaded and good prices to rent a court. I will be back.  Highly recommend!!

user_reviews.Name: Christine Rose
user_reviews.Description: What a wonderful place to play pickleball, great surface and under cover. Floodlights for play in evenings. Our friend who lives in Hoi An invited us,we had a brilliant time.  Friendly people and you can hire paddles.

user_reviews.Name: Jay See
user_reviews.Description:
Second trip to Hoi An but first time playing pickleball here. Very nice courts which opened in Feb 2025 (1 month old when I visited). Spacing between courts is generous, all 6 courts are clean and there is an option to open or close the roof. As it was a Thursday afternoon, it wasn't busy until 4-5pm onwards. Another selling point - it was inexpensive as it was VND 100k for the hour I played excluding paddles and balls (extra 50k).
Would happily come back and play another game, you will be looked after by Bao!

title: PINPON SPORT Badminton 24/7
address: Đường Số 6, An Hải, Sơn Trà, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Anastasiia Datsenko
user_reviews.Description:
Super clean, no weird smells, everything’s in great condition, from the courts to the rackets.

There’s water, which is a lifesaver, because it gets HOT. Like really hot. So wear something light and bring a towel unless you wanna leave looking like you took a swim 😅

But it’s fun, clean and great for a good laugh (and workout) with your people. I’ll be back and next time with extra deodorant lol 😜

user_reviews.Name: Billy D Baker
user_reviews.Description: Excellent courts and good vibes here.  A fun place to play.

user_reviews.Name: Phu My (Trip)
user_reviews.Description: Good

user_reviews.Name: Thuy Ngo
user_reviews.Description:
Sân cầu lông mình yêu thích nhất tại Đà Nẵng.
Sân chia làm 2 khu, mỗi khu 3 sân rộng rãi, đánh có thể nghe được tiếng cầu không quá ồn như các sân khác. Chỗ ngồi rộng rãi, thoải mái, trang bị đầy đủ các dụng cụ, ổ cắm điện sạc điện thoại có giá treo điện thoại, có cả tripod để quay video ^^
Chủ sân dễ thương, nhiệt tình, thân thiện, rất welcome khách hàng. Highly recommend mọi người đến sân này ạ!!!!

user_reviews.Name: Kieu Ngan Nguyen
user_reviews.Description: Đi vào theo gg maps là tới, sân thảm nên cần phải đi giày thể thao đế mềm mới được vào sân nhé, không dùng được các loại giày có đế nhọn. Sân khá mới, rộng rãi, có cho mượn bục trao giải, ghế trọng tài, bảng điểm và căng băng rôn giải đấu. Mình đặt 2 tiếng giá khoảng 240k. Có quạt và ổ điện xung quanh nên ngồi cũng không bị nóng. Buổi tối ở đây khá đông người tới chơi.

user_reviews.Name: Quan Le
user_reviews.Description:
Tôi và bạn bè đã có một trải nghiệm cực kỳ thất vọng tại sân pickleball này. Thái độ của chủ sân rất thiếu chuyên nghiệp, tỏ ra khó chịu và cáu gắt khi chúng tôi hỏi về thời gian đặt sân cũng như cơ sở vật chất.

Sân cực kỳ bẩn, rác chưa được dọn, nền sân có nhiều vết ố và thậm chí có chỗ còn trơn trượt nguy hiểm. Không gian thì nóng nực, không có hệ thống thông gió hay quạt mát đầy đủ, khiến việc chơi thể thao trở nên mệt mỏi và khó chịu.

Cơ sở vật chất đã cũ kỹ, xuống cấp trầm trọng, các vạch sân mờ, lưới thì rách, và không có khu vực nghỉ ngơi hay để đồ sạch sẽ. Nhà vệ sinh thì bẩn và có mùi, rõ ràng không được dọn dẹp thường xuyên – hoàn toàn không đảm bảo vệ sinh và an toàn cho người chơi.

user_reviews.Name: William Boumeester
user_reviews.Description: I was visiting Da Nang for a couple of weeks and wanted to play tennis.  My hotel helped connect me to Roger. Roger is an excellent player and a great hitting partner. He was able to accommodate my schedule and we played mostly in the evenings when it was cooler. Roger was very kind and responsive to WhatsApp messages  He is one of the best net players I’ve hit with. He can return the ball to the same location consistently. Amazing! I will play him again when I return to Da Nang.  Highly recommended!!

user_reviews.Name: gctseng gmail
user_reviews.Description:
[Note: call ahead if you plan to go very early (like before 8:15AM). We were there at 5AM the first time we went and luckily one of the “regulars” were there playing and helped turned on the lights for our court before staff arrived.  The second time we went we were there at 8AM and by then I knew where the light switches were, haha.]

Poon Poon Pickleball is like a 7-8min walk from Little Riverside Hoi An hotel (see my other review).  I was able to convince my spouse to play every single day we were in Hoi An.  Yes, she indulged me as we had to wake up extra early to ensure we had time to play, return to the hotel to eat breakfast before starting our tours and activities for the day.

Rates are ₫150.000/hr if you’re not a member (not sure what membership requires) and ₫140.000/hr for members. They’re kind of inconsistent in charging because the 1st time we visited we were charged ₫150k and then the second time we visited we were only charged ₫70k (for 1/2 hour).  Regardless, the staff was very nice.

Nice, clean courts with good baseline spacing.  They provide indoor balls (not sure about whether they provide paddles), but probably should use outdoor balls based on the surface of the courts.

Overall, I’d be very happy staying at the same hotel we were in and coming here every morning.

(Nobody’s asking, but yes I let her win a few games so she’d play more… .)

user_reviews.Name: Ed Cobb (Double Shot)
user_reviews.Description: My first time playing pickleball. Nice courts and facilities. Great night. Very hot night so I was sweating a lot.

user_reviews.Name: CWWSIM
user_reviews.Description: Great courts and such a fun place to be playing pickleball at! Nguyen was super helpful and friendly, would love to be back!

user_reviews.Name: Sammy Blivaiss
user_reviews.Description:
What a gem to come across in Hoi An!
We heard the dinking down an alley and decided to walk on by and was amazed to see how many people are playing Pickleball. The next morning we returned to play!
Highly recommend - paddle and ball are available for rent too!

user_reviews.Name: Timothy Chan
user_reviews.Description: Not a real review, just a helper for anyone looking for the courts: the map currently shows it on the north side of a small inlet (not the main river). It's actually on the south side of the inlet. The courts themselves look in great condition.

user_reviews.Name: Kai Tran
user_reviews.Description:
Newly built with reasonable rent fee, racquet for rent is also available. Highly recommend for tourist who want to have sport activity.
P/s: reservation in advance for suggestion! Their yards mostly full in evening time

user_reviews.Name: Sam
user_reviews.Description: Great place, clean field, good rental equipment and fair price.

user_reviews.Description: They charged us extra money for being foreigners. First time this has ever happened. Charged us almost 3 times the normal amount for absolutely made up reasons.

user_reviews.Name: Tom G.
user_reviews.Description:
There are so many courts in Đà Nẵng now but nana is not competitive anymore. The court is not maintained very well and old guys smoking indoors at night.

I think social price needs to drop to 25k ( courtyard is 50k + water, wet towel and fruit and the court is much nicer).

Now we have TBE and HERA closeby with much better courts and environment.
Riverpoint social = 25k.

Court price with 120k /h during the day is also too expensive. Duy King and G4 = 80k /h with better courts.

The most positive about nana is the morning staff with Tiến being very friendly and welcoming to guest s.

user_reviews.Name: Sophie Ann
user_reviews.Description:
1. Super hot in the court. No fans is provided. They hide them all the time, taking away from the court.  Closed room without any air inside at all.
2. If you book your court ypu will fing another ppl playing on your court 5-10 minutes of your paid time. But manager does nothing about it at all.
3.ppl walking front and back or making pictures on your booked court while u trying to play. But manager does nothing about it at all.
4. The bigger surprise will waiting for you when 1 of the staff will start to smoke cigarettes inside the closed court with no fresh air inside it

user_reviews.Name: Adam Neilson
user_reviews.Description:
Great pickleball courts - nicely shaded as indoors, but with windows open for a breeze.
Only 120k/hour and an extra 20k per paddle.

user_reviews.Name: Bing Yu
user_reviews.Description: Excellent pickleball courts with 3 indoor  and 1 outdoor. We played in 2 and spent 120k vnd per hour with rackets and balls included. It’s the best one among the 3 pickleball places I’ve been to in da nang. The owner is very friendly and welcoming! I’ve been playing twice there and will certainly come back!

user_reviews.Name: Alessandro Vitro
user_reviews.Description: They have the best courts (we tried 3 others) and it's even good price. It's a pity nobody knows it but at the same time I'm happy I always find an available court to play.

Only 120k/hour and an extra 20k per paddle.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bing Yu
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent pickleball courts with 3 indoor  and 1 outdoor. We played in 2 and spent 120k vnd per hour with rackets and balls included. It’s the best one among the 3 pickleball places I’ve been to in da nang. The owner is very friendly and welcoming! I’ve been playing twice there and will certainly come back!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alessandro Vitro
user_reviews_extended.Description: They have the best courts (we tried 3 others) and it's even good price. It's a pity nobody knows it but at the same time I'm happy I always find an available court to play.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Patrick Desranleau
user_reviews_extended.Description: Try to get some information but the guy at the reception was not interested and I never took is eyes off is phone

title: Crush Pickleball Club
address: 440 Tôn Đức Thắng, Hòa Khánh, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: BẢO DUYÊN
user_reviews.Description: happy 🤣

user_reviews.Name: Thuong Nguyen
user_reviews.Description: Good

user_reviews.Name: Vân Hoàng
user_reviews.Description: Quán cà phê nhỏ, nhưng mỗi góc đều được chăm chút, đồng bộ, có cây xanh, menu đơn giản, rõ ràng, nhìn vào là pick được món muốn uống ngayyy. Quán phù hợp ngồi học riêng lẻ hơn là học nhóm, nhà vệ sinh rộng rãi. Giá đồ uống giao động 25k-40k

user_reviews.Name: Hera Jung
user_reviews.Description:
Mình đi cf, giấc 2h chiều nắng nóng nên khá yên tĩnh 🤣 View và decor quán khá dth nha. Quán có máy lạnh vừa đủ mát mẻ, nước uống khá, giá hợp lý ko quá đắt. Ly cốc trình bày đều rất xinh ☺️
Tệp khách hôm đó ko phải gu mình lắm nhưng mà maybe sẽ comeback

user_reviews.Name: Mẫn Nguyễn
user_reviews.Description: Mang tiếng là tuyển Social nhưng lên sân không một ai xếp kèo, bắt người chơi đợi rất lâu mới được đánh và đánh bị lệch trình độ nhau quá nhiều. Đúng nghĩa là lên sân, phát cho 1 quả banh rồi mạnh ai nấy chơi, người họ lạ thì họ đâu có quen biết ai mà chơi. Quá vô trách nhiệm và làm mất thời gian của tôi.

user_reviews.Name: Thái Xuân
user_reviews.Description: Sân mới sạch, có cho thuê vợt, đánh buổi sáng sớm quá đẹp. Nice

user_reviews.Name: Hoang Vo
user_reviews.Description: Sáng nay đi thấy đóng cửa rồi l, bên trong đồ đạc ngổn ngang 😂 không thấy update gì mắc công chạy xa tới.

user_reviews.Description: Отличная удобная закрытая площадка для игры в пиклбол. Чисто. Все новое. Большие хорошие вентиляторы. Но больше не вернусь сюда. user_reviews.Name: medium_nice
user_reviews.Description: Absolutely fantastic pickleball court! The facility is well-maintained, with a clean and professional setup that makes playing here a real pleasure. The owner Quinn and her husband are incredibly friendly and welcoming, making everyone feel at home. The pricing is very fair, and the community is a great mix of players of all levels and all nationalities, creating a fun and inclusive atmosphere. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced player, this is the perfect place to enjoy a great game. Highly recommend!

user_reviews.Name: RosieCheeks
user_reviews.Description:
My favourites of them all - Quin Anh and Dave are the most friendly people I know in Hoi An and I love them to bits. We come here to play on a regular basis with group of friends.

The owners take great pride in ensuring that the pickleball court is always in top-notch condition. Their attention to detail, from regular cleaning to prompt maintenance of the surface and equipment, reflects their commitment to providing a safe, clean, and enjoyable space for all players. It's clear they genuinely care about the players' experience, always going above and beyond to create a welcoming and well-maintained environment."

user_reviews.Name: Bình Lương Trg
user_reviews.Description: "Enjoying a fantastic day of pickleball under the sunny skies! With Tet just around the corner, what more could we ask for? 🌞🏓 #GoodVibes #PickleballFun #TetCelebration"

user_reviews.Name: Harry Forster
user_reviews.Description: F1 Pickleball is great! The owners are lovely and were great to talk to. They were so polite. The facilities are brand new and it is in a fantastic location. The drinks on offer are amazing too! Would highly recommend

user_reviews.Name: Anna Huynh
user_reviews.Description:
Amazing Pickleball Court. The best in Hoi An. The owners Ahn and Dave are super nice and friendly. Coffee is also delicious.

Free rentals of rackets & balls. 10/10

user_reviews.Name: Vanessa Weiss
user_reviews.Description: Great place! The owners are super friendly and speak well English. Its a plus that they have nets between the courts so perfect to practise with kids. I can highly recommend the place.

user_reviews.Description: Lovely court with beautiful lakeside view and drinks. I will comeback.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Phan Ngọc Nguyên
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Tôi mới đến Hội An dịp cuối năm này thì có thấy quán này để bảng khai trương thì có dẫn bạn bè vào trải nghiệm thử.
Sau khi chơi, bạn có thể thưởng thức một ly cà phê thơm ngon hoặc các món đồ uống độc đáo tại quán.
Không gian cà phê thoáng đãng, decor đẹp, phù hợp để nghỉ ngơi, làm việc hoặc trò chuyện với bạn bè.
Nhân viên và chủ quán nhiệt tình, thân thiện và dịch vụ nhanh chóng.

title: SeaMart Pickleball
address: 146 Duy Tân, Hòa Cường, Đà Nẵng 560000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Lien Nguyen
user_reviews.Description:
👍 Ưu điểm
•	Sân có 7 sân con chuẩn pickleball tại địa chỉ 146 Duy Tân.  ￼
•	Giờ mở cửa linh hoạt: khoảng 5:00 sáng đến 23:00 hàng ngày.  ￼
•	Giá thuê khá rõ: khoảng 120 – 160 🐠/giờ tùy khung giờ.  ￼
•	Vị trí trung tâm Quận Hải Châu nên dễ tiếp cận, tiện cho đánh sau giờ làm hoặc cuối tuần.

⚠️ Lưu ý
•	Vì nằm trong khu vực đô thị và có nhiều người đặt sân nên giờ cao điểm (chiều tối) thường full, bạn nên đặt trước nếu đi nhóm.  ￼

🎯 Gợi ý khi đến
•	Đặt sân trước online hoặc gọi điện để chắc chắn có giờ đẹp, đặc biệt là từ 17:00 đến 20:00 là dễ đông.
•	Nếu bạn mới chơi, nên đến sáng sớm hoặc đầu giờ chiều khi ít người hơn để dễ hẹn đánh, thoải mái thử sân.

user_reviews.Name: Clinton T
user_reviews.Description:
1st time playing this sport. Heard all the hype and decided to give it a go. Was on holidays in Da Nang and found this place next to the hotel.
Just decided to ask if I could join a social session for beginners and was welcomed with open arms. Session starts from 7pm-9pm but this place closes at 11pm and was lucky enough to meet the owner of the facility , Jazzy.
Her English was fluent so she helped with all my questions etc….
I paid 50k VND to join and 50k VND for racquet hire. Relatively cheap in my opinion to have a go.
Had a few social matches and wow what a workout. Place was not air conditioned but it has a retractable roof opened to let in some fresh air. Of course there were fans blowing everywhere!
Pleasant experience and would highly recommend if you ever wanted to try or even play there if you are a regular player visiting.

user_reviews.Name: Alison Chui
user_reviews.Description: The courts are spacious and new! Rented rackets and ball for a one-hour game. They have fans but still sweaty bc of the weather. We enjoyed the visit!!! :) staff is nice and we didn’t have to start the game at 00 (fixed hour) since there were vacant courts. Fabulous experience! Good deal for hiring a coach too, if you want to play seriously :)

user_reviews.Name: Vincent Ferrafiat
user_reviews.Description: Great spot to play pickleball in Da Nang! The courts are high-quality and well maintained, making every game enjoyable. The owners are super friendly and always welcoming, which creates a really nice and relaxed atmosphere. Highly recommended for both beginners and experienced players!

user_reviews.Name: Adam Menzies
user_reviews.Description: Nice facility! Only drawback is that the lights turned on and off a few times during our court rental, so we had to stop, draw the sun shade back for light…and then the lights turned back on 10 min later, had to close the sun shade again. Obv the sun shade being open caused us to get roasted and super sweaty lol.

user_reviews.Name: Ann
user_reviews.Description: A stunning sports venue just 5 minutes from Da Nang’s My Khe Beach, surrounded by luxury hotels and ocean breeze. I felt totally relaxed in this beachy, laid-back vibe.

user_reviews.Name: Alex
user_reviews.Description: I absolutely love this place — it’s elevated my game for sure! The owner, Lha, is fantastic and always so helpful via Zalo whenever I need support. I also really enjoy playing with Thong; he makes every session fun and competitive. Even when the socials are light on players, they always find someone for me to hit with, which I really appreciate. And it’s pretty cool that Court 1 has instant replay via video — a great touch that makes the experience even better. Highly recommend to anyone looking to improve and enjoy their pickleball!

user_reviews.Name: 베트남 10년차
user_reviews.Description: Comparing to the new facilities, the worst service. To the people who considering to come here, don’t. You have a plenty of choice elsewhere.

user_reviews.Name: Count Monte Fisto
user_reviews.Description: Had a nice time there, will be glad to return

user_reviews_extended.Name: mArIn Life with Beach
user_reviews_extended.Description:
新しいピックルボールコート。

立地の兼ね合いかベトナム人が客層を占めており、外国人は他のコートより少ないイメージです。

他のコートよりやや価格は高いですが、清潔で扇風機も複数完備されています。

コートにカフェとシューズショップもあるので、休憩もしやすいです。

SocialはReclubにはなく、Zalo GroupかAlobo経由で申し込む形になります。

ありがとうございました！また来ます。

user_reviews_extended.Description: Mình vào ĐN du lịch tình cờ tim đuọc sân này ngay gần khách sạn. Sân thoáng mát, nhân viên rất nhiệt tình và chu đáo. Giá sân so với chất lượng thật sự xứng đáng ạ

user_reviews_extended.Name: Candy Thao
user_reviews_extended.Description: Sân sạch sẽ, nhân việ phục vụ tốt, gần biển nên mát mẻ! Giá hơi cao hơn so với một số sân nhưng đáng tiền.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bất động sản Trustland
user_reviews_extended.Description: Sân Pick rất đẹp, rộng rãi, thoáng mát!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Abby Tran
user_reviews_extended.Description: Sân mới, sạch sẽ, rộng và thoáng. Mới mở nên chưa đông lắm, khá yên tĩnh. Nhân viên nhiệt tình

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mint
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tolle Anlage umzubauen in der Nähe der Unterkunft. Ich würde allerdings nur empfehlen reserviert auf dem Platz zu spielen. Vom „Social Spiel“ Würde ich stark abraten, da hier sich ständig vor gedrängelt wird und man nicht zum Spiel kommt. Spielerwechsel von einem Feld zum anderen, um durchzuspielen. Das hat nichts mit Social zu tun, sondern hier wird eher versucht günstig, so viel wie möglich zu spielen. Wie gesagt, mit dem reservier Kann ich  diese Anlage empfehlen. Ansonsten sind wir mit einem Social spiel Auf 5 Minuten Spielzeit gekommen.

title: ATP Clubhouse Pickleball
address: Bình Kỳ, Ngũ Hành Sơn, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam
plus_code: 264M+2C Ngu Hanh Son, Da Nang, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Дмитрий Новиков
user_reviews.Description:
I arrived at the facility today at 11:15 to rent a court, rackets, and a ball for one hour. There were at least five courts available. Two administrators refused to rent a court to me and my friend.
I recently moved to this area, and for the past four days—from November 29 to December 2—my friend and I have been coming here in the mornings without any issues. Today, we were denied service. I tried to find out the reason, but no one even attempted to explain it to me.
The administrators were completely unprofessional and incompetent. Dear owners, please train your staff to work properly. Besides losing money, you are also losing respect from tourists. After the refusal, I simply crossed the street to your competitors—“Pickleball hợp thành phát”—and spent my money there. Think about it.

user_reviews.Name: Max Leslie-Smith
user_reviews.Description:
Disappointed to say we had a bad experience here.

Turned up on time for our pre-booked court and they said there was a tournament on, so we had to wait 30 minutes to play with no warning from the court.

Then after 1 hour 30 more we were kicked off the court (the owner was there too for this conversation) and they made us pay for 2 hours, even though we only played for 1 hour 30 mins.

Won’t be coming back

Edit - when you moved us to another court, this was our suggestion not yours, also we suggested that we move to another court later, that was also our suggestion. You also didn’t let us extend our session. And no apology from you at any point. When you make a mistake, please be honest in your reply.

user_reviews.Name: Shivansh Singh
user_reviews.Description:
Amazing courts, international standard 👌
Nice and spacious, good seating area with fans. The staff is also very nice and friendly

user_reviews.Name: David
user_reviews.Description: I was surprised you were closed. Hope you are opening up somewhere else. You did a great job.

user_reviews.Name: dana eagland
user_reviews.Description:
They have 3 courts for social play newbies intermediate and 2.7 plus
After playing on 2.7 plus I was told to play on intermediate along with all other players I played with.
Then on the intermediate players played endless games I waited 30 -45 minutes
I mentioned this to organisers and he said they are playing 2 games ( he was not really interested.
Then I see players i played with on the 2.7 court playing again ( they where same or lower level to me .
I felt unwelcome and seems like what should be a good system badly organised and a boys club for the ones that know the staff

user_reviews.Name: Duy Đặng
user_reviews.Description: This is the best pickleball court I have ever experienced

user_reviews.Description: Great !
